---
title: "Feature matrix"
subtitle: "Coverage of the ggplot2 and plotnine surface in Gribouille."
toc: true
toc-depth: 2
engine: markdown
---

## Context

Gribouille is a Typst package that implements a grammar of graphics on top of CeTZ.
This page is the canonical coverage table: one row per public ggplot2 symbol, using the [ggplot2 reference index](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/reference/index.html) as the axis.
Status reflects what is currently in the package; Priority orders the remaining work.
The execution order, agent topology, and slice protocol live in the development roadmap (kept under `.claude/dev-plans/` in the repository).

Legend for **Status**:

- тЬЕ implemented.
- ЁЯЯб partial or stubbed.
- тмЬ missing.
- тЭМ out of scope for a static Typst backend (reason in Notes).

Legend for **Priority** (used to order future work):

- P1 unlocks common plots and blocks other work.
- P2 broadens expressiveness once P1 lands.
- P3 nice-to-have or niche.
- P4 deferred to the very end of the roadmap: requires a wasm helper or heavy numerical code that Typst cannot express natively. **Wasm is a last resort**, added only if a P4 feature is really needed and no native workaround exists. Until then every P4 row sits behind everything in P1 to P3.
- тИЕ not planned.

## How gribouille currently maps to ggplot2

| Concept | ggplot2 form | gribouille form |
|---|---|---|
| Plot constructor | `ggplot(data, aes(...)) + layer + scale + theme`. | `plot(data:, mapping:, layers:, scales:, coord:, facet:, theme:, width:, height:)`. |
| Layer addition | `+ geom_point()`. | `layers: (geom-point(), ...)`. |
| Aesthetic mapping | `aes(x = a, y = b, colour = c)`. | `aes(x: "a", y: "b", colour: "c")`. |
| Stat override | `stat = "bin"` on a geom. | `stat:` key on the layer dict, dispatched via `src/stat/apply.typ`. |
| Theme composition | `theme_minimal() + theme(...)`. | `theme: theme-minimal()` (dict merged by `merge-theme`). |

## Feature matrix

### Plot basics

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ggplot()` | `plot(...)`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `aes()` | `aes(...)`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Covers `x`, `y`, `colour`, `fill`, `size`, `alpha`, `group`. |
| `%+%` / `add_gg()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Typst has no lazy plot object; composition is via function args. |
| `ggsave()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Typst owns the output pipeline. |
| `qplot()` / `quickplot()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Deprecated upstream. |

### Geoms

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `geom_point()` | `geom-point`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `geom_line()` | `geom-line`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | X-sorted connection of observations. |
| `geom_path()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Like `geom-line` but preserves row order. |
| `geom_step()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Step interpolation. |
| `geom_col()` | `geom-col`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Honours `position = "stack"`/`"dodge"`/`"fill"`. |
| `geom_bar()` | `geom-bar`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Wraps `geom-col` with `stat = "count"` and `position = "stack"`. |
| `geom_histogram()` | `geom-histogram`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Uses `stat-bin`. |
| `geom_freqpoly()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Line of bin counts. |
| `geom_ribbon()` | `geom-ribbon`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `geom_area()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Ribbon with `ymin = 0`. |
| `geom_smooth()` | `geom-smooth`. | ЁЯЯб | P3 | `method = "lm"` only; `"loess"` deferred, wasm is last resort. |
| `geom_boxplot()` | `geom-boxplot` (stub). | ЁЯЯб | P2 | Needs quantile computation; currently accepts pre-summarised rows. |
| `geom_violin()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Needs kernel density; deferred, wasm is last resort. |
| `geom_density()` / `geom_density_2d()` / `geom_density_2d_filled()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | KDE; deferred, wasm is last resort. |
| `geom_dotplot()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Niche. |
| `geom_jitter()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Point wrapper over `position-jitter`. |
| `geom_rug()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Axis tick marks at observations. |
| `geom_text()` | `geom-text`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Reads the `label` aesthetic. |
| `geom_label()` | `geom-label`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Boxed text with fill, stroke, radius. |
| `geom_rect()` / `geom_tile()` / `geom_raster()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Tile and raster are the same with implicit sizing. |
| `geom_polygon()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Closed paths with fill. |
| `geom_segment()` / `geom_curve()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Uses `xend`, `yend`. |
| `geom_errorbar()` / `geom_errorbarh()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Ship with boxplot work. |
| `geom_linerange()` / `geom_crossbar()` / `geom_pointrange()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Same family as errorbar. |
| `geom_abline()` / `geom_hline()` / `geom_vline()` | `geom-abline`, `geom-hline`, `geom-vline`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Scalar or array intercepts. |
| `geom_blank()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Useful for forcing scale training. |
| `geom_function()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Evaluate a Typst callable over the x-range. |
| `geom_qq()` / `geom_qq_line()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Quantile-quantile plots. |
| `geom_quantile()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Quantile regression; deferred, wasm is last resort. |
| `geom_count()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Wrapper over `stat-sum`. |
| `geom_bin_2d()` / `geom_hex()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | 2D binning. |
| `geom_contour()` / `geom_contour_filled()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Marching squares. |
| `geom_spoke()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Niche. |
| `geom_map()` / `geom_sf()` / `geom_sf_label()` / `geom_sf_text()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Maps and sf are out of scope. |

### Stats

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `stat_identity()` | `stat-identity` (implicit). | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `stat_count()` | `stat-count`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `stat_bin()` | `stat-bin`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `stat_smooth()` | `stat-smooth`. | ЁЯЯб | P3 | OLS only; `"loess"` deferred, wasm is last resort. |
| `stat_boxplot()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Per-group five-number summary. |
| `stat_summary()` / `stat_summary_bin()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Aggregated mean/median/sd. |
| `stat_ecdf()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Sort + cumulative fraction. |
| `stat_ellipse()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Normal data ellipses. |
| `stat_density()` / `stat_density_2d()` / `stat_density_2d_filled()` / `stat_ydensity()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | KDE; deferred, wasm is last resort. |
| `stat_contour()` / `stat_contour_filled()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | тАФ |
| `stat_bin_2d()` / `stat_bin_hex()` / `stat_summary_2d()` / `stat_summary_hex()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | 2D aggregation. |
| `stat_qq()` / `stat_qq_line()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | тАФ |
| `stat_quantile()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Deferred, wasm is last resort. |
| `stat_function()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | тАФ |
| `stat_unique()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Deduplicate rows. |
| `stat_manual()` / `stat_align()` / `stat_connect()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Advanced. |
| `stat_sf()` / `stat_sf_coordinates()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Out of scope. |
| `after_stat()` / `after_scale()` / `stage()` / `from_theme()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Late-binding aesthetics. |

### Position adjustments

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `position_identity()` | implicit default. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `position_stack()` | `position-stack`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Consumed by `geom-col`. |
| `position_dodge()` | `position-dodge`. | ЁЯЯб | P2 | Uniform-width case implemented; widening to handle variable-width and overlapping marks (the ggplot2 `dodge2` use case) is in Slice 2D. |
| `position_dodge2()` | merged into `position-dodge`. | тЭМ | тИЕ | Dropped from the surface; `position-dodge` covers both cases. |
| `position_fill()` | `position-fill`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Stack normalised to 1 per x bucket. |
| `position_jitter()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | тАФ |
| `position_nudge()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | тАФ |
| `position_jitterdodge()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | тАФ |

### Annotations

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `annotate()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Inline single-row layer. |
| `annotation_custom()` / `annotation_raster()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Map to CeTZ primitives. |
| `annotation_logticks()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Needs log trans first. |
| `annotation_map()` / `borders()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Maps out of scope. |

### Aesthetics (names consumed by `aes()`)

| ggplot2 | gribouille | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `x`, `y` | `x`, `y`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `xmin`, `xmax`, `ymin`, `ymax` | `xmin`, `xmax`, `ymin`, `ymax`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Exposed via `aes()` and trained like other positional aesthetics. |
| `xend`, `yend` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Segments and curves. |
| `colour`, `fill` | `colour`, `fill`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `alpha` | passed as a constant param. | ЁЯЯб | P2 | Promote to a mapped aesthetic. |
| `size` | via `scale-size-continuous`. | ЁЯЯб | P2 | Not mapped via `aes()` in every geom. |
| `shape` | `shape` via `scale-shape`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Circle, square, triangle, diamond, cross, x, star, triangle-down palette. |
| `linetype` | `linetype` via `scale-linetype`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Solid, dashed, dotted, dash-dotted, densely-dashed, loosely-dashed palette. |
| `linewidth` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Mapped line width. |
| `stroke` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Point outline width. |
| `group` | `group`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `weight` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Weighted stats. |
| `xlower`, `xmiddle`, `xupper`, `lower`, `middle`, `upper` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Boxplot internals. |
| Inline type coercion (`aes(colour = factor(x))`, `aes(x = as.numeric(g))`) | `as-factor("col")` / `as-numeric("col")` inside `aes()`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | ggplot2 lets you force a mapping discrete or continuous at the `aes()` call site with `factor()` / `as.numeric()`. Today gribouille only supports data-level (`as-factor(data, ...)` mutates the column across the plot) or scale-level (`scale-colour-discrete()`) coercion; neither scopes to a single aesthetic, so the same numeric column cannot be continuous on `x` and discrete on `colour` at the same time. Solution: extend the existing `as-factor` and `as-numeric` into dual-arity functions. Called with `(data, col)` they keep their current behaviour; called with `("col")` from inside `aes()` they return a small annotation dict (`(kind: "mapping-ref", var: col, type: "discrete" \| "continuous")`). Update `_column-for-aesthetic` and `_layer-aesthetic-type` in `src/scale/train.typ` to accept either a plain string or the annotation dict. No new public names. |

### Positional scales

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `scale_x_continuous()` / `scale_y_continuous()` | `scale-x-continuous`, `scale-y-continuous`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `scale_x_discrete()` / `scale_y_discrete()` | `scale-x-discrete`, `scale-y-discrete`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `scale_x_log10()` / `scale_y_log10()` | via `trans: "log10"` on continuous. | ЁЯЯб | P2 | Add convenience wrappers. |
| `scale_x_sqrt()` / `scale_y_sqrt()` | via `trans: "sqrt"`. | ЁЯЯб | P2 | Add convenience wrappers. |
| `scale_x_reverse()` / `scale_y_reverse()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | New trans. |
| `scale_x_binned()` / `scale_y_binned()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Continuous-to-binned axis. |
| `scale_x_date()` / `scale_y_date()` / `scale_x_datetime()` / `scale_y_datetime()` / `scale_x_time()` / `scale_y_time()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Needs Typst `datetime` handling. |

### Colour and fill scales

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `scale_colour_continuous()` / `scale_fill_continuous()` | `scale-colour-continuous`, `scale-fill-continuous`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `scale_colour_discrete()` / `scale_fill_discrete()` | `scale-colour-discrete`, `scale-fill-discrete`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `scale_colour_manual()` / `scale_fill_manual()` | `scale-colour-manual`, `scale-fill-manual`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | User-supplied palette array. |
| `scale_colour_viridis_c/d/b()` / `scale_fill_viridis_c/d/b()` | `scale-colour-viridis-c/d/b`, `scale-fill-viridis-c/d/b`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | viridis, magma, plasma, inferno, cividis. |
| `scale_colour_brewer()` / `scale_fill_brewer()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | ColorBrewer palettes. |
| `scale_colour_gradient()` / `gradient2()` / `gradientn()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Low-mid-high and n-stop gradients. |
| `scale_colour_steps()` / `steps2()` / `stepsn()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Binned gradient. |
| `scale_colour_grey()` / `scale_fill_grey()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Grey ramp. |
| `scale_colour_hue()` / `scale_fill_hue()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | HCL-spaced hues. |
| `scale_colour_distiller()` / `fermenter()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Continuous Brewer. |
| `scale_colour_identity()` / `scale_fill_identity()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Use raw values. |

### Other aesthetic scales

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `scale_alpha()` / `*_continuous()` / `*_discrete()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | After `alpha` aesthetic lands. |
| `scale_size()` / `scale_radius()` | `scale-size-continuous`. | ЁЯЯб | P2 | Add radius variant. |
| `scale_size_area()` / `scale_size_binned_area()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Area-proportional sizing. |
| `scale_size_binned()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | тАФ |
| `scale_shape()` / `scale_shape_manual()` / `scale_shape_binned()` | `scale-shape`, `scale-shape-manual`. | ЁЯЯб | P3 | `_binned` variant deferred. |
| `scale_linetype()` / `scale_linetype_manual()` / `scale_linetype_binned()` / `scale_linetype_continuous()` / `scale_linetype_discrete()` | `scale-linetype`, `scale-linetype-manual`. | ЁЯЯб | P3 | `_binned`, `_continuous`, `_discrete` variants deferred. |
| `scale_linewidth()` / `scale_linewidth_manual()` / `scale_linewidth_binned()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | After `linewidth` aesthetic. |
| `scale_*_identity()` (shape, size, alpha, linetype, linewidth, discrete, continuous) | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Unscaled values. |

### Labels and limits

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `labs()` | `labs(title:, subtitle:, caption:, x:, y:, colour:, fill:, ...)`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Axis names are injected into trained scale specs. |
| `xlab()` / `ylab()` / `ggtitle()` | `xlab`, `ylab`, `ggtitle`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Thin wrappers over `labs()`. |
| `get_labs()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | тАФ |
| `lims()` / `xlim()` / `ylim()` | via scale `limits:`. | ЁЯЯб | P2 | Top-level shortcut. |
| `expansion()` / `expand_scale()` | via scale `expand:`. | ЁЯЯб | P3 | Expose helper. |
| `expand_limits()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | тАФ |

### Guides

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Discrete `guide_legend()` for colour/fill | automatic legend. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `guide_colourbar()` / `guide_colorbar()` | automatic colourbar. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Emitted when trained colour/fill is continuous. |
| `guide_legend()` customisation (nrow, ncol, reverse, ...) | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | тАФ |
| `guide_bins()` / `guide_coloursteps()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | After binned scales. |
| `guide_axis()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Tick rotation, dodging. |
| `guide_axis_logticks()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | After log trans. |
| `guide_none()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Suppress a specific legend. |
| `guide_axis_stack()` / `guide_axis_theta()` / `guide_custom()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Advanced. |
| `guides()` top-level | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Plot-level guide control. |
| `sec_axis()` / `dup_axis()` / `derive()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Secondary axes. |
| `draw_key_*()` glyph family | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Per-geom legend glyphs. |

### Facetting

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `facet_wrap()` | `facet-wrap`. | ЁЯЯб | P1 | Needs `scales = "free"/"free_x"/"free_y"` and per-facet stats. |
| `facet_grid()` | `facet-grid(rows:, cols:)`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Strips on top (columns) and right (rows); shared scales only. |
| `vars()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Helper to quote faceting variables. |
| `labeller()` / `label_value()` / `label_both()` / `label_context()` / `label_parsed()` / `label_wrap_gen()` / `label_bquote()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Strip label customisation. |

### Coordinates

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `coord_cartesian()` | `coord-cartesian`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | `xlim`/`ylim` override trained x/y domains (data is not dropped; out-of-range marks still render). |
| `coord_fixed()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Aspect ratio lock. |
| `coord_flip()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Swap x and y. |
| `coord_polar()` / `coord_radial()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Significant rewrite. |
| `coord_trans()` / `coord_transform()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Visual transformation without scale retraining. |
| `coord_map()` / `coord_quickmap()` / `coord_sf()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Maps out of scope. |

### Themes

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `theme_minimal()` | `theme-minimal`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `theme_classic()` | `theme-classic`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `theme_void()` | `theme-void`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | тАФ |
| `theme_grey()` / `theme_gray()` / `theme_bw()` / `theme_linedraw()` / `theme_light()` / `theme_dark()` / `theme_test()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Additional complete themes. |
| `theme()` | `theme(..fields)`. | тЬЕ | тАФ | Translates `element_*` dicts into flat keys consumed by `merge-theme`. |
| `element_blank()` / `element_rect()` / `element_line()` / `element_text()` / `element_polygon()` / `element_point()` / `element_geom()` | `element-blank`, `element-rect`, `element-line`, `element-text`. | ЁЯЯб | P2 | `element-polygon`/`element-point`/`element-geom` deferred. |
| `margin()` / `margin_part()` / `margin_auto()` / `rel()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Sizing helpers. |
| `theme_get()` / `theme_set()` / `theme_update()` / `theme_replace()` / `%+replace%` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Global theme state; may stay plot-arg only. |
| `theme_sub_axis*()` / `theme_sub_legend()` / `theme_sub_panel()` / `theme_sub_plot()` / `theme_sub_strip()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P4 | Shortcut groups. |

### Vector helpers

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `cut_interval()` / `cut_number()` / `cut_width()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Discretise numeric vectors. |
| `resolution()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P2 | Used by dodge. |
| `mean_se()` / `mean_cl_boot()` / `mean_cl_normal()` / `mean_sdl()` / `median_hilow()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Summary helpers for `stat_summary`. |

### Programming and extension

| ggplot2 | gribouille symbol | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ggproto()` / `ggproto_parent()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | S3/R6 pattern; Typst uses dict-of-functions instead. |
| `aes_()` / `aes_string()` / `aes_q()` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Deprecated upstream. |
| `print.ggplot` / `plot.ggplot` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | Typst handles rendering. |
| `autoplot()` / `autolayer()` / `fortify()` / `map_data()` / `automatic_plotting` | тАФ | тЭМ | тИЕ | R S3 dispatch. |
| `get_alt_text()` | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Could expose via a plot `alt:` argument. |

### Bundled datasets

| ggplot2 | gribouille | Status | Priority | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `diamonds`, `mpg`, `economics`, `economics_long`, `faithfuld`, `midwest`, `msleep`, `presidential`, `seals`, `txhousing`, `luv_colours`. | тАФ | тмЬ | P3 | Ship a small `data/` module with one or two sample datasets for examples. |

## Coverage at a glance

- **Geoms**: 11 of ~35 implemented (`point`, `line`, `col`, `bar`, `histogram`, `ribbon`, `smooth`, `hline`, `vline`, `abline`, `text`, `label`), 1 stubbed (`boxplot`); rest missing or out of scope.
- **Stats**: 4 of ~18 implemented.
- **Positions**: 3 of 7 (identity, stack, dodge, fill).
- **Scales**: position, discrete/continuous/manual/viridis colour and fill, size, shape, linetype тАФ ~15 symbols; binned variants deferred.
- **Coords**: `coord-cartesian` with xlim/ylim; others missing.
- **Facets**: `facet-wrap` and `facet-grid`, shared scales only.
- **Themes**: 3 complete themes plus `theme()` + four `element-*` constructors.
- **Guides**: discrete swatch legend plus colourbar for continuous colour/fill.

## How this page is updated

Every implementation slice flips the Status column for every row it touches in the same commit as the code.
The orchestrator owns these edits.
See the development roadmap under `.claude/dev-plans/` for the slice ordering and protocol.
